TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi sealed SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp extends System.Enum

Docs.summary: Specifies the transfer function (opto-electronic transfer characteristic) of a color space using CICP (Coding Independent Code Points) identifiers as defined in ISO 23001-8.

remarks.format:
## Remarks
`SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp` identifies the electro-optical transfer function of a color space using the CICP table defined in ISO 23001-8 and ITU-T H.273. These identifiers are used when creating color spaces with <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace.CreateCicp> alongside a <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp> value.
This enum is a value type and requires no disposal.
## Examples
```csharp // Create an sRGB-like color space using CICP identifiers var colorSpace = SKColorSpace.CreateCicp( SKColorspacePrimariesCicp.Rec709, SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp.Rec709); ```

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Hlg = int32(18)

Docs.summary: Hybrid Log-Gamma (HLG) transfer function (CICP value 18), defined in ITU-R BT.2100.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Iec6196621 = int32(13)

Docs.summary: IEC 61966-2-1 transfer function (CICP value 13), the sRGB electro-optical transfer characteristic.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Iec6196624 = int32(11)

Docs.summary: IEC 61966-2-4 transfer function (CICP value 11), the xvYCC electro-optical transfer characteristic.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Linear = int32(8)

Docs.summary: Linear transfer function (CICP value 8), with no gamma encoding applied.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Pq = int32(16)

Docs.summary: Perceptual Quantizer (PQ) transfer function (CICP value 16), defined in SMPTE ST 2084 and ITU-R BT.2100 for HDR content.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Rec202010bit = int32(14)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.2020 transfer function for 10-bit systems (CICP value 14).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Rec202012bit = int32(15)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.2020 transfer function for 12-bit systems (CICP value 15).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Rec470SystemBg = int32(5)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.470 System B/G transfer function (CICP value 5), assuming a display gamma of approximately 2.8.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Rec470SystemM = int32(4)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.470 System M transfer function (CICP value 4), assuming a display gamma of approximately 2.2.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Rec601 = int32(6)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.601 transfer function (CICP value 6), used for standard-definition video.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Rec709 = int32(1)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.709 transfer function (CICP value 1), used for HDTV and sRGB-compatible content.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp SmpteSt240 = int32(7)

Docs.summary: SMPTE ST 240 transfer function (CICP value 7), an early HDTV standard now largely superseded by BT.709.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp SmpteSt4281 = int32(17)

Docs.summary: SMPTE ST 428-1 transfer function (CICP value 17), used in digital cinema (DCDM).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Unknown = int32(0)

Docs.summary: An unknown or unspecified transfer function (CICP value 0).
